name: Stew
intro: Serve with a side of your choice, such as: steamed rice, boiled/fried plantain, sweet potatoes, boiled yam, etc.

ingredients.item: vegetable stock cube Salt to taste

method: Add all the ingredients except the meat alternative into a pot, bring to a boil then simmer on medium heat for 15-20 minutes. Add the meat alternative and cook for a further 5 minutes.
Serve with a side of your choice, such as: steamed rice, boiled/fried plantain, sweet potatoes, boiled yam, etc.
